step_rationale: Negative regulator of platelet activation; correlates with aggregation; endothelial-platelet interface.
mechanism: Cell-adhesion molecule functioning as a negative regulator of platelet activation and correlating with aggregation capacity.

references.title: Mice Lacking PECAM-1 and Ceacam1 Have Enhanced Platelet Secretion and Thrombus Growth: Novel Link with PAR4.
Characterization of the platelet transcriptome by RNA sequencing in patients with acute myocardial infarction.
